hero.description: Family-run car dealership in Hradec Králové with over 25 years of experience. Every vehicle undergoes thorough technical inspection. Buy with confidence.
hero.guarantee: Warranty on every car · Service history · Personal approach

aboutTeaser.description: We are a family-run business with over 25 years of experience in used car sales. We pride ourselves on honesty, transparency, and long-term customer relationships. Every car we sell, we would buy for our own family.
aboutTeaser.highlight2: Thorough technical inspection of every vehicle
aboutTeaser.highlight3: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees

contactForm.title: Contact form
contactForm.name: Full name
contactForm.messageRequired: Message must be at least 10 characters
contactForm.messagePlaceholder: Which car are you interested in? Or write us any question...
contactForm.successDesc: We will get back to you soon. We usually respond within 24 hours.
contactForm.errorMsg: Failed to send message. Please try again or contact us by phone.

aboutPage.story1: I have been selling cars for over 25 years and have sold hundreds of vehicles to customers across the Czech Republic and Europe.
aboutPage.story2: I approach every customer the way I would want to be treated myself. I inspect each car thoroughly, tell you everything I know, and I don't try to sell at any cost. Many people come back to me again or send a friend, and that tells me I'm doing things right.
aboutPage.story3: You can find me at Františka Halase 2196 in Hradec Králové. Stop by anytime or give us a call to arrange a visit.
aboutPage.value1Desc: We're not a large chain. You deal directly with the owner who will tell you everything straight.
aboutPage.value2Desc: The price is the price. We inspect every car before sale and you get a full history report.
aboutPage.value3Desc: We don't sell anything we would doubt ourselves. If a car isn't right, we simply don't offer it.
aboutPage.value4Desc: A large part of our customers have bought from us more than once, or referred us to family and friends.
aboutPage.value5Desc: No need to come to us. We can deliver the car directly to your home — anywhere in the Czech Republic.
aboutPage.ctaDesc: Browse our current inventory or contact us. We'll be happy to help you find the right one.
